generated_oml:
namespace base = "http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#"
namespace DTDFVocab = "http://example.com/DTDFVocab"
instance MABIMAX100BaseAxis : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Base axis component of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot"
]

instance MABIMAX100Joints : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Six-axis joint assembly of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot"
]

instance MABIMAX100MechanicalStructure : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Mechanical structure of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot"
]

instance ManufacturingEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Manufacturing environment for MABI MAX 100 industrial robot",
    base:contains MABIMAX100
]

instance MABIMAX100 : DTDFVocab:SystemUnderStudy [
    base:desc "MABI MAX 100 industrial robot",
    base:contains MABIMAX100BaseAxis, MABIMAX100Joints, MABIMAX100MechanicalStructure,
    DTDFVocab:hasEnvironment ManufacturingEnvironment
]

instance InputCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor measuring input current to robotic joints",
    DTDFVocab:producedData RobotSensorDataTransmission
]

instance OutputAngleSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor measuring output angle of robotic joints",
    DTDFVocab:producedData RobotSensorDataTransmission
]

instance RobotSensorDataTransmission : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom InputCurrentSensor, OutputAngleSensor
]

instance FrictionLossDetection : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detection of friction loss in robotic joints through real-time analytics"
]

instance MotionAccuracyImprovement : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic adjustment of robot motion parameters to improve accuracy based on sensor data",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance SystemStateVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of system state for monitoring and troubleshooting"
]

instance PerformanceMetricsVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visualization of performance metrics for operational optimization"
]

instance FrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous multi-physics-aware joint friction identification service for real-time analysis of joint friction in industrial robots",
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionLossDetection
]

instance AccuracyImprovementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time accuracy improvement service for robotic operations using sensor data-driven adjustments",
    DTDFVocab:provides MotionAccuracyImprovement
]

instance DashboardVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Dashboard-based visualization service for system state monitoring and performance metrics display",
    DTDFVocab:provides SystemStateVisualization, PerformanceMetricsVisualization
]

]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system maintains real-time synchronization with the physical asset through continuous data streams from live sensor measurements, ensuring the digital representation reflects the current physical state with minimal latency for critical operational monitoring."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The system employs a Digital Shadow Reference Model as a UML class diagram to define the structure of contextual data traces, their aggregation, and abstraction for manufacturing applications, orchestrating the integration of physical data into the digital representation through standardized component interfaces and data flow mechanisms."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Communication between physical and virtual components uses MQTT protocol for sensor data transmission; network topology, bandwidth, and redundancy specifications are not detailed in the document."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Sensor data is streamed via MQTT protocol; Asset Administration Shells (AAS) are implemented."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The system implements Asset Administration Shells (AAS) for standardized asset management, adheres to Model-Based Systems Engineering (MBSE) using SysML for requirements and architecture modeling, and employs UML class diagrams for reference model definitions, with architecture description languages (ADLs) such as AADL, ACME, and MontiArc ensuring interoperability and component-based system descriptions."
]
